description: Unit: shared expression mode contract accepts only `path-only`, `template`, and `expression`.
Unit: shared context root model serializes/deserializes predictable root/path metadata.
Unit: shared path discovery flattens nested object paths in deterministic order.
Unit: shared path discovery includes array markers/segments according to design rules.
Unit: insertion helper inserts token at cursor start/middle/end in a plain input.
Unit: insertion helper replaces active selection range correctly in textarea/input.
Unit: insertion helper returns no-op when target element is readonly/disabled/unfocused.
Unit: shared validation result object normalizes severity/path/message fields.
Unit: invoice context adapter emits expected roots and canonical billing path options.
Unit: invoice adapter path option labels stay stable for known bindings (invoice/customer/tenant/item).
Unit: workflow context adapter emits payload/vars/meta/error and forEach roots when present.
Unit: workflow adapter resolves vars paths from prior step output schema recursively.
Integration: invoice palette FIELDS list renders from adapter-provided options (not hardcoded catalog).
Integration: invoice field search filters adapter-provided options by label/path.
Integration: invoice `bindingKey` insertion writes raw path token (no moustache wrapper).
Integration: invoice text insertion writes moustache token in template mode.
Integration: invoice fallback insertion path appends token to selected text node metadata when inspector target is absent.
Unit: invoice moustache parser compiles single token text (`{{invoice.total}}`) into AST `path` expression.
Unit: invoice moustache parser compiles mixed literal + tokens into AST `template` expression with args.
Integration: invoice imported-text preservation keeps original AST expression when preview text is unchanged.
Integration: invoice exported AST remains deterministic after export->import->export with shared layer enabled.
Integration: invoice validation feedback appears for invalid inserted path and allows correction without crashing editor.
Unit: workflow legacy `${...}` path extraction helper is removed or unused in step validation flow.
Integration: workflow step expression validation panel uses shared validation results for errors and warnings.
Integration: workflow validation correctly flags unknown roots and missing vars references through shared validator.
Unit: workflow editor completion provider function list is filtered to runtime-allowlisted function set.
Unit: workflow diagnostics provider function warnings align with runtime allowlist (no hinted-but-disallowed functions).
Regression: workflow persisted config still stores expressions as `{ $expr: string }` with no schema change.
Unit: runtime expression engine still rejects disallowed functions after editor alignment changes.
Unit: runtime expression engine still enforces timeout and output size limits after migration.
Unit: shared schema-aware path check returns informational diagnostics for unresolved schema paths.
Integration: Monaco insertion path uses shared insertion semantics and preserves cursor position post-insert.
Integration: Monaco drop/insert path continues stripping trailing snippet placeholders where applicable.
Integration: invoice input insertion remains cursor-accurate for repeated insertions and mixed manual typing.
Integration: invoice text preview resolves known moustache tokens into formatted values and leaves unknown tokens visibly marked.
Regression: existing invoice preview mode tests for field/table/totals scaffolds remain green.
Regression: workflow runtime v2 unit suite remains green for expression compile/evaluate/resolve behaviors.
Regression: workflow runtime integration tests remain green for control flow and event-trigger expression execution paths.
Repo: invoice static template variable catalog file is removed and no imports remain.
Repo: workflow designer no longer imports or invokes legacy `${...}` scanner validation helpers.
Meta-test: all new/changed React UI tests in this scope run under Vitest + Testing Library and target controls via role/automation attributes (except explicit render-semantics cases).
Smoke: both designers render and accept at least one inserted binding path in the same local session without runtime errors.
Meta-test: insertion/validation tests are non-tautological by asserting resulting AST/model/diagnostic behavior, not only source-literal string echo.
Meta-test: feature-to-test traceability check confirms every `F00x` entry has at least one mapped `featureIds` reference.
